content:
# AI Tools for Data Analysis and Reporting in 2026

Data analysis doesn't have to be complicated. AI tools help you analyze data and create reports faster than ever!

Check out our [[link:/category/Productivity|Productivity category]] for more AI tools.

---

## Notion AI: Smart Data Organization

Notion AI helps you organize and analyze data within your workspace.

### Notion AI for Data Analysis
- **Automatic summaries**: Get key insights from your data
- **Query assistance**: Find information quickly
- **Report generation**: Create summaries automatically

---

## ChatGPT: Data Interpretation

ChatGPT can help you interpret complex data and explain findings in plain language.

### ChatGPT for Data Analysis
- **Explain statistics**: Make complex data understandable
- **Generate insights**: Ask questions about your data
- **Write reports**: Draft report sections automatically

---

## Comparison Table

| Tool | Best For | Price |
|------|----------|-------|
| Notion AI | Workspace data | $8/mo |
| ChatGPT | Interpretation | Free-$20/mo |
| [[link:/tools/52|ClickUp AI]] | Project data | $7/mo |

---

## Our Recommendations

- **Workspace data**: Start with Notion AI
- **Data interpretation**: Use ChatGPT
- **Project data**: Try [[link:/tools/52|ClickUp AI]]

Ready to analyze data smarter? Try these AI tools today!
